nodes.context: International outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1999 in Pattaya, Thailand. Support club for the Bandidos.
International outlaw motorcycle club. Diablos is a support club for Bandidos.
International outlaw motorcycle club. Involved in a raid on Diablos clubhouse in Australia.
Finnish criminal group involved in extortion alongside Bandidos and Diablos.

edges.context: Diablos is a support club (puppet club) for the Bandidos.
Hells Angels raided Diablos clubhouse in Melbourne in 2013, leading to a shootout with Bandidos.
Hells Angels ambushed Bandidos members arriving to support Diablos after the raid, resulting in a shootout.
Diablos, Bandidos, and X-Team members were involved together in a violent extortion case in Oulu, Finland.
Bandidos and X-Team members were convicted together for extortion related to a debt collection for Diablos.
